enriched_points.expanded_content: Effective stakeholder collaboration fosters diverse perspectives, enhancing the research process and ensuring that findings are applicable and beneficial to all parties involved.
Engaging stakeholders throughout the research helps align studies with real-world needs, increasing the relevance and applicability of findings to patient care and health policies.
By incorporating stakeholder insights, comparative effectiveness research can lead to improved healthcare decisions, ultimately resulting in better health outcomes for patients and communities.
